text: First Southwest Airlines flight with Starlink! https://t.co/JBK7fE0r91
summary: First Southwest Airlines flight with Starlink!
ai_summary: Southwest Airlines completed its first flight equipped with Starlink satellite internet connectivity, demonstrating a significant commercial application of SpaceX's Starlink constellation beyond traditional ground-based internet. This milestone represents both a business partnership validating Starlink's in-flight connectivity product and a competitive advancement in the commercial aviation market, where inflight internet has become a key passenger amenity.
embed_html:
First Southwest Airlines flight with Starlink! https://t.co/JBK7fE0r91

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) June 23, 2026

text: Starlink coming to @AmericanAir next year! https://t.co/JsLEfZq7AD
ai_summary: Elon Musk announced that Starlink satellite internet service will be integrated into American Airlines' in-flight connectivity offering starting next year. This represents a significant B2B expansion for Starlink beyond consumer markets, demonstrating how the company is commercializing its satellite infrastructure for enterprise partnerships and improving customer experience in aviation—a key business development milestone for scaling Starlink's revenue streams.
embed_html:
Starlink coming to @AmericanAir next year! https://t.co/JsLEfZq7AD

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) June 23, 2026
